case_title: WESLEY MCCARTY VS. WOODS REMODELING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCARTY, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS REMODELING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA WRI CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
